content: We have network-related code while the CONFIG_NET config is not set in the CI configs. Is there a reason?
I already add this config in the arm64 condition. If this config is wanted, I could add this for other architectures and make a PR.

Sure, go ahead, thanks!

I suggest you add it at the end of each config if possible, since we will be moving to a different system where we will have the options to be enabled explicitly listed.
